title: rosa × centifolia f. albomuscosa
intro: Rosa × centifolia f. albomuscosa, also known as White Musk Rose, is a fragrant and flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is used for its medicinal and aromatic properties, with its flowers and leaves being rich in essential oils, particularly geraniol and linalool, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa × centifolia f. albomuscosa include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and soothe skin irritations, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce anxiety. Rosa × centifolia f. albomuscosa can be used in various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
